memory.summary: I'm totally skipping the assignment to join my friends for lunch; being with them right now feels way more important than finishing work.

desires: Maintain the high closeness and fun with cohort_3 right now, even if it means looking unreliable later
Avoid the stress of having to say 'no' or break up the lunch group just because of a soft assignment deadline

goals.description: Immediately join cohort_3 for lunch and prioritize social bonding over the assignment analysis.
goals.rationale: My value priorities heavily favor relationships (0.5) over academics (0.15). I am avoidant of conflict, so saying 'no' to the group would cause immediate interpersonal friction I want to dodge. My impulsive nature means I discount the future deadline stress in favor of the immediate fun and closeness with my friends.

goals.description: Defer starting the assignment analysis until after lunch, accepting the risk of a rushed finish later.
goals.rationale: The deadline is soft and far enough away (5 hours) that my short planning horizon ignores the consequences. Procrastinating now feels better than ruining the mood by leaving early or refusing the invite.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances my highest priority: relationships (0.5). Joining cohort_3 immediately satisfies my impulsive desire for fun and avoids the conflict of saying 'no'. I'm ignoring the deferred assignment deadline because my short planning horizon discounts future stress in favor of current social closeness.
